name: codex-preflight
description: Local-first pre-execution repository risk scanner for Codex-style coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Preflight risky repository commands before Codex runs them.
interface.longDescription: Codex Preflight is a local-first, command-aware, execution-chain guard for Codex-style coding agents. It statically scans repositories before risky commands run, detects dangerous capabilities and uncertainty, and returns ALLOW, WARN, ASK_USER, or BLOCK decisions with JSON and Markdown reports.
defaultPrompt: Check this Docker command before running it.
Review this shell command with Codex Preflight.
